prompt: Design a meditation app icon featuring a zen stone balanced on water ripples, monochrome charcoal with single gold accent dot
prompt_refined: Generate a minimalist meditation app icon. The design features a perfectly balanced stack of smooth zen stones, centrally placed, with their base subtly emerging from calm, concentric water ripples. The entire composition should be rendered in a monochrome charcoal palette, emphasizing dark gray tones and textures. A single, small, gold accent dot is subtly positioned on the topmost zen stone, acting as a focal point.
objects: Perfectly balanced stack of smooth zen stones (centrally placed)
Calm, concentric water ripples (base of stones emerging from)
Single, small, gold accent dot (on topmost zen stone)
